Definition: average mass of the structure (in grams)
average length of the structure (in millimeters)
average percent of cells in the structure that are neurons
average number of other (nonneuronal) cells in the structure
average density of neurons per milligram of tissue in the structure
average density of other (nonneuronal) cells per milligram of tissue in the structure

Note: MBR = average brain mass (in grams) [data from Herculano-Houzel et al., 2007, and Gabi et al., 2010]

Definition: average structure mass fraction (expressed as percentage of the whole body mass)
average structure mass fraction (expressed as percentage of the CNS mass; brain + spinal cord)
average structure neuron number fraction (expressed as percentage of the CNS neuron number; brain + spinal cord)
